title: feat: upload parsed docx images from read file worker
known_problem: File worker change. Run focused service worker/readFile tests plus app build.

commands.name: service_worker_readfile_tests
commands.shell: pnpm exec vitest run test/worker/readFile/extension/docx.test.ts test/worker/readFile/integration.test.ts test/worker/utils.test.ts -c vitest.config.ts

commands.name: global_markdown_test
commands.shell: pnpm exec vitest run test/common/string/markdown.test.ts -c vitest.config.ts
commands.reason: Run focused markdown test for changed global parser.

commands.name: prepare_sdks
commands.reason: Rebuild generated SDK dist files after git clean before app build.

commands.name: build_projects_app
commands.reason: Dataset image API must compile through app build.
